Common.title: KioskFlow - POS & ERP Platform for F&B

Landing.subtitle: Comprehensive digital solution for Restaurants & Cafes (F&B)
Landing.selectMode: Select an operating mode to start
Landing.posDescription: Professional point of sale for cashiers and waiters.
Landing.kitchenDescription: Real-time kitchen order display and preparation tracker.
Landing.dashboardDescription: Business management, inventory, payroll, and analytics.
Landing.tableDescription: QR code table ordering experience for dine-in guests.
Landing.heroDescription: KioskFlow AI is not just a touchscreen. The system understands emotions, optimizes ingredients (BOM), and automatically deducts stock in an instant.
Landing.micPrompt: Tap Mic or select your emotion

tired.label: Tired, need energy
tired.prompt: I feel so tired, recommend something to recharge quickly?
tired.title: Energy Awakening Combo ⚡
tired.desc: Perfect combination of rich Caffeine from premium Arabica beans and instant energy-boosting carbs.

hot.label: Hot, need refreshment
hot.prompt: The weather is so hot, is there a cool refreshing drink to cleanse?
hot.title: Refreshing Cooling Combo ❄️
hot.desc: Cooldown instantly with cold-brew tea combined with fresh juicy fruits and a light mousse cake.

sweet.label: Sweet tooth, need treats
sweet.prompt: Craving sweet treats this afternoon, any recommended drink & cake?
sweet.title: Sweet Cravings Combo 🧁
sweet.desc: Rich and smooth matcha milk tea alongside sweet chocolate muffin, soothing all stress.

stress.label: Stressed, need peace
stress.prompt: Work is so stressful, can you suggest a warm and gentle drink?
stress.title: Peaceful Relaxation Combo 🍃
stress.desc: Warm chamomile honey tea to soothe nerves and relieve stress with healthy oatmeal cookies.

cart.addItems: Select items to add to your order

tables.emptyTable: Table is empty. Ready for guests.
